title: Fresh Crisp Korean Chicken Gimbap
description: A citrusy and crowd-pleasing Korean dish from the Chungcheong region, featuring chicken and amaretti in a gimbap form, cooked in a tagine style without nuts
instructions: Preheat the tagine or a large skillet with a lid over medium heat
In a bowl, whisk together rice vinegar, sesame oil, salt, black pepper, and tagine spice blend
Add the chicken to the bowl and marinate for at least 10 minutes
Add the crushed amaretti cookies to the marinade and stir to combine
Remove the chicken from the marinade and cook in the preheated tagine or skillet until browned and cooked through
Prepare the gimbap by laying a seaweed sheet flat on a cutting board
Spread a thin layer of cooked sushi rice onto the seaweed sheet, leaving a 1 inch border at the top
Place a few pieces of the cooked chicken in the center of the rice
Add any desired additional fillings, such as dried citrus peel
Roll the gimbap into a tight cylinder using a bamboo sushi mat or a clean tea towel
Slice the gimbap into 1 inch thick rounds and serve immediately
